descriptionShort: Orland Kurtenbach returns to hockey coaching the Richmond Sockeyes in the BCJHL.
descriptionLong: Orland Kurtenbach, former NHL player and Vancouver Canucks coach, has taken on the coaching position with the Richmond Sockeyes junior-A team in the British Columbia Junior Hockey League for the 1986-87 season. The 50-year-old is balancing coaching with his insurance business and golf driving range development, working from 8 a.m. to midnight daily. Kurtenbach was recruited by Sockeyes owner Bruce Taylor and intends to evaluate his coaching commitment after one year.
